further_reading.title: Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Framework (AI RMF 1.0)
further_reading.why_relevant: Useful background for deciding when AI use is low-risk versus when stronger controls and review are needed.

further_reading.title: Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Framework: Generative Artificial Intelligence Profile
further_reading.why_relevant: Covers practical generative-AI risk patterns that map well to the module's guidance on verification, boundaries, and safe use.

notes: No inline-citation seed entries were created because the module is primarily procedural guidance and pedagogical framing, with no specific dated facts, vendor-version claims, standards references by name, incidents, statistics, pricing, or security-event claims that require inline citation under the rubric.
